title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 25 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 25 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 25 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.36 % today, the main contract closed at 856.5.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is normal.PBF at Shandong port deal 895 yuan/mt,increase 5 yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 910 yuan/mt,increase 7-10 yuan/mt. Recently, there have been new developments regarding the reduction of crude steel.
